languages.original_text: "If that is a veiled invitation for me to lie on a dissecting table and let you delve around in my innards, it was a decent attempt, but try again."

languages.text: "Если это завуалированное предложение лечь на секционный стол и позволить тебе покопаться в моих внутренностях, то попытка была хороша, но попробуй еще раз".
"If that is a veiled invitation for me to lie on a dissecting table and let you delve around in my innards, it was a decent attempt, but try again."

"If that is a veiled invitation for me to lie on a dissecting table and let you delve around in my innards, it was a decent attempt, but try again."

languages.text: «Si eso es una invitación velada a tumbarme en una mesa de disección y permitirte rebuscar en mis entrañas, ha sido un intento decente, pero no ha tenido éxito».

languages.text: 「それが、解剖台に横たわって貴様に臓物を漁らせろという遠回しの誘いのつもりなら、なかなかの試みではあったが、出直してくるがいい」
languages.original_text: "If that is a veiled invitation for me to lie on a dissecting table and let you delve around in my innards, it was a decent attempt, but try again."

traits.locale_text: 「それが、解剖台に横たわって貴様に臓物を漁らせろという遠回しの誘いのつもりなら、なかなかの試みではあったが、出直してくるがいい」

languages.text: “如果这是在委婉地邀请我躺上解剖台，任你翻腾我的内脏，那你做得还算不错，但请再接再厉。”
languages.original_text: "If that is a veiled invitation for me to lie on a dissecting table and let you delve around in my innards, it was a decent attempt, but try again."

traits.locale_text: “如果这是在委婉地邀请我躺上解剖台，任你翻腾我的内脏，那你做得还算不错，但请再接再厉。”

languages.text: "Wenn das eine unterschwellige Aufforderung ist, mich auf einen Seziertisch zu legen, um Euch in meinen Innereien wühlen zu lassen ... netter Versuch, aber nein."
languages.original_text: "If that is a veiled invitation for me to lie on a dissecting table and let you delve around in my innards, it was a decent attempt, but try again."

traits.locale_text: "Wenn das eine unterschwellige Aufforderung ist, mich auf einen Seziertisch zu legen, um Euch in meinen Innereien wühlen zu lassen ... netter Versuch, aber nein."

languages.text: « Si c'était une façon de m'enjoindre à m'allonger sur une table de dissection pour vous laisser fouiller mes entrailles, j'applaudis l'effort, mais non merci. »
languages.original_text: "If that is a veiled invitation for me to lie on a dissecting table and let you delve around in my innards, it was a decent attempt, but try again."

traits.locale_text: « Si c'était une façon de m'enjoindre à m'allonger sur une table de dissection pour vous laisser fouiller mes entrailles, j'applaudis l'effort, mais non merci. »

languages.text: "Eğer bu, diseksiyon masasına yatmam ve iç organlarımı deşmene izin vermem için üstü kapalı bir davetse yemezler. Tekrar dene."
languages.original_text: "If that is a veiled invitation for me to lie on a dissecting table and let you delve around in my innards, it was a decent attempt, but try again."
